x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Research Firms
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specialized agencies that conduct research on behalf of their clients. They design studies, collect data, analyze results, and provide insights.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Internal Market Research Departments
x-enumeration-literals.description: Teams within a company that handle research tasks. They may conduct their own studies or collaborate with external firms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Clients/Businesses
x-enumeration-literals.description: Companies seeking to understand market trends, consumer behaviour, and competitive landscapes. They use the research to inform their business strategies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Survey Respondents
x-enumeration-literals.description: Individuals who participate in surveys, focus groups, or interviews. Their feedback and opinions are crucial for gathering primary data.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Analysts
x-enumeration-literals.description: Professionals who interpret and analyze the collected data to extract meaningful insights and trends.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Field Researchers
x-enumeration-literals.description: Individuals who collect primary data through various means, such as face-to-face interviews, phone surveys, or online questionnaires.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Consultants
x-enumeration-literals.description: Experts who provide advice on how to utilize market research findings to make strategic business decisions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Marketing Teams
x-enumeration-literals.description: Departments within a company that use market research to develop marketing strategies, campaigns, and product development plans.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Development Teams
x-enumeration-literals.description: Groups that use market research insights to design and improve products to meet consumer needs and preferences.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sales Teams
x-enumeration-literals.description: Teams that leverage market research to understand customer needs, refine sales tactics, and identify potential opportunities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investors/Stakeholders
x-enumeration-literals.description: Individuals or entities that use market research to assess the viability and potential success of a company or product.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Bodies
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government agencies that may require market research for compliance, policy-making, or to understand industry trends.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Competitors
x-enumeration-literals.description: Other companies in the market that may indirectly benefit from publicly available research findings or conduct their own competitive analysis.
